zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
当前价格1564附近，整体呈震荡偏弱结构，价格运行于20日均线1608下方，短线多头动能不足，市场进入整理阶段，方向未明。

MACD指标维持负值-20.38，动能柱未见收敛，空头优势仍占主导。若无法重新站上1608均线，反弹将受压制，短期偏空运行格局延续。

下方关键支撑位1560已多次测试，若失守将下看1545区域；上方阻力集中在1608及1650一线，突破需量能配合。

操作上建议以区间交易为主，未有效突破1608前谨慎追多，可在1560附近分批轻仓试多，跌破则及时止损观望。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently trading at 1564.21, hovering near the lower end of its recent 24-hour range between 1560.03 and 1571.09. Price action remains subdued, reflecting a mild 0.29% daily change and limited volatility. The broader structure suggests a short-term bearish bias as the market fails to reclaim the 20-period SMA, indicating ongoing weakness in momentum and a lack of decisive bullish continuation.

Momentum indicators reinforce the bearish tone, with MACD at -20.38620 signaling persistent downside pressure. Although RSI is unavailable, price behavior below the SMA(20) at 1608.44800 suggests that selling pressure has dominated recent sessions. The slope of the moving average appears downward, indicating weakening trend strength. Any intraday rebounds are currently corrective rather than trend-reversing, as buyers struggle to generate sustained momentum above short-term resistance zones.

Immediate support is found near 1560.03, which aligns with the recent session low and acts as a near-term liquidity zone. A break below this level could expose further downside toward 1545 and 1520, where historical consolidation may attract buyers. On the upside, resistance is established at 1571.09, followed by the 20-SMA near 1608. These levels form a layered ceiling that must be cleared to shift sentiment back toward neutral or bullish conditions.

Trading conditions favor a cautious approach, with short-term strategies leaning toward range trading or selling rallies into resistance. Traders may consider maintaining a defensive stance below the 20-SMA, using tight risk controls above 1571 to manage potential breakouts. Long positions remain higher risk unless price reclaims 1608 with conviction. Until then, momentum continues to favor sellers, and patience is warranted before expecting a sustainable trend reversal.
